contexts.context: ...Indiana!" exclaimed Raymon, "well thou knowest that <mark>henceforward</mark> thou must to me be still more beautiful....
...and goes to sleep upon his gross violence. <mark>Henceforward</mark> thou art no longer his; thou art my beloved...
